landing.heroTitle: One login. Every hat you wear.
landing.heroSubtitle: Money deserves the same care you give everything else.
landing.heroDescription: FlowRate is where Independent, Household, Family, and Company money live in separate rooms — same calm house. Connect banks once, switch context in a tap, and see what matters without the spreadsheet noise.
landing.heroTrust: Free to start — no card required

howItWorks.title: From scattered to clear in three moves
howItWorks.description: No marathon setup. Link a bank, pick your space, and FlowRate starts showing you the picture — not just the receipts.

previews.connect: Plaid & Stripe — credentials stay with them

connect.title: Connect your banks
connect.description: Link personal, joint, or business accounts securely via Stripe. Your credentials never touch our servers.

organize.title: Organize into Spaces
organize.description: Independent, Household, Family, or Company — each space keeps its own accounts, budgets, and permissions.

act.title: Act with confidence
act.description: Track burn rate, catch duplicate SaaS, split expenses, and teach teens to save — all from one intelligent dashboard.

landing.spacesTitle: Four spaces for four versions of you
landing.spacesDescription: You are not one budget. FlowRate gives each chapter of your financial life its own room — without losing sight of the whole house.
landing.featuresTitle: More than a ledger that nods along
landing.featuresDescription: Passive trackers tell you what already happened. FlowRate catches subscription creep, models runway, and helps families teach saving — before the month ends wrong.
landing.pricingDescription: Each tier is designed for a specific kind of money manager. Start free, upgrade when your life or business grows.
landing.ctaTitle: Open your first space in minutes
landing.ctaDescription: Founders watch runway. Couples split fairly. Parents give teens a supervised view. Start free — upgrade when life gets more interesting.

demo.title: Same app, different chapter
demo.description: Tap a space. Watch the dashboard reshape — balances, alerts, and activity that actually match how you manage that money.
demo.caption: Illustrative demo — your real numbers sync after you connect a bank.

household.hint: Joint bills, separate accounts, fair splits

company.hint: Burn, runway, SaaS waste, cloud spend
company.alertTitle: SaaS Shield flagged a price hike
company.alertMessage: Design tool renewed 22% higher — review seat count

spaces.label: Financial spaces in one login — Independent to Company

bank.label: Bank link via Plaid — start free with one connection

shield.label: SaaS Shield catches duplicate subs & price hikes

export.label: Export on every plan — audit-ready on Enterprise

independent.title: Independent
independent.description: Just you — personal accounts, side income, subscriptions, and savings goals in one clean view.

household.title: Household
household.description: Couples and roommates — mix joint and separate accounts, set shared budgets, and split recurring bills fairly.

family.title: Family
family.description: Parents and guardians — manage the household, set allowances, create savings jars, and give teens supervised access.

company.title: Company
company.description: Solo founders and freelancers — monitor burn rate, runway, SaaS waste, and cloud spend alongside personal money.

spaces.title: Financial Spaces
spaces.description: Switch between Independent, Household, Family, and Company contexts. One login, every hat you wear.

accounts.title: Any Account Setup
accounts.description: Connect banks as personal or shared. Mix joint and separate accounts — FlowRate aggregates what you choose to share.

saasShield.title: SaaS Shield
saasShield.description: Detect duplicate subscriptions, price hikes, and wasted seats across personal and business spend.

burnRate.title: Burn Rate & Runway
burnRate.description: Company spaces show monthly burn, cash runway, and cloud/dev-tool spend — built for founders.

teen.title: Teen & Child Accounts
teen.description: Allowances, savings jars, spending limits, and teen logins with guardian oversight.

ai.title: Optional AI Insights
ai.description: Pro and Enterprise subscribers will be able to opt in to AI-powered spending analysis. Today, categorization uses rule-based matching—no AI processes your data unless you choose to enable it later.

pricing.swipeHint: Swipe or use arrows to compare plans

free.name: Free
free.targetDetail: Track personal finances without paying a cent — ideal for your first budget.

pro.name: Pro
pro.targetDetail: When personal and professional money overlap — or when you share finances with a partner.
pro.description: For freelancers and founders who mean business.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.targetDetail: Multiple people managing company money with roles, audit trails, and priority support.

dateField.help: Choose a date on the calendar.

child.title: For kids
child.description: This is your money page. Your parent set it up so you can see savings and allowance — tap the big buttons to move around.
child.steps: Tap My Money to see savings jars|Tap Accounts to connect a bank with a parent|Tap Settings if you need help from a grown-up

teen.title: For teens
teen.description: Track your allowance, savings jars, and spending. Use the menu at the bottom on phone, or the left menu on computer.
teen.steps: Check My Money for jars and allowance|Connect a bank from Accounts|See spending in Transactions

parent.title: For parents & guardians
parent.description: Manage family money in one place. Connect banks, invite partners, and supervise children — each button below is a main area.
parent.steps: Connect banks in Accounts|Invite family in Family|Set budgets in Budgets|Switch spaces with the dropdown at top left

business.title: For your business
business.description: Watch cash, burn rate, and subscriptions. Connect your business bank first, then review transactions and SaaS spend.
business.steps: Open Business for runway|Connect accounts|Review SaaS in Subscriptions

general.title: Getting started
general.description: Welcome! Start by connecting a bank, then explore transactions and budgets. On phone, use the bar at the bottom; on computer, use the menu on the left.
general.steps: Connect a bank in Accounts|See activity in Transactions|Track limits in Budgets

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Cash flow, categories, net worth, and spending patterns for your active space.
analytics.emptyDescription: Connect a bank account and sync transactions to unlock charts and insights.
analytics.emptyDescriptionConnected: Your bank is connected, but there are no transactions in this period. Sync from banks to import activity — sandbox test accounts often have no spending history.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitleSimple: Link your bank here to see balances and transactions automatically.
accounts.emptyDescriptionSimple: Follow the steps below — we never store your bank password.
accounts.filterHelp: Choose which accounts you want to see in this list.
accounts.connectHelp: Personal stays private to you. Shared is visible to guardians in this space.
accounts.steps: Tap Connect your first bank|Sign in with your bank (US or Europe)|Come back here — balances appear in a minute
accounts.subtitle: Connect banks, choose personal or shared visibility, and keep balances in sync.
accounts.subtitleConnected: Your banks are connected. Sync from banks anytime to pull the latest balances and transactions.
accounts.teenSubtitle: Connect your bank to track spending and see where your money goes.
accounts.teenSubtitleConnected: Your bank is connected. Sync when you spend — test accounts may not have transactions until activity is imported.
accounts.teenEmptyDescription: Link your bank account to sync transactions and unlock spending insights. Only you and your guardians can see this account.
accounts.emptyDescription: Connect personal or shared bank accounts. In Household and Family spaces, you choose what guardians can see.
accounts.mixedAccountsDescription: Each member connects their own banks. Tag accounts as Personal (only you) or Shared (visible to guardians). Company spaces work the same way for founders and team members.
accounts.bankRegionNote: Connect European banks (France, Germany, UK, and more) via Plaid, or US banks via Stripe Financial Connections. Your bank credentials are never stored — only read-only balances and transactions.
accounts.plaidLinkLoadError: Failed to load Plaid Link. Allow cdn.plaid.com in your browser or disable ad blockers, then try again.
Failed to load Plaid Link. Allow cdn.plaid.com in your browser or disable ad blockers, then try again.
accounts.plaidSandboxDescription: Use test banks only. Sign in with username user_good and password pass_good. Real European banks need PLAID_ENV=production, a production secret, and PLAID_REDIRECT_URI registered in the Plaid dashboard.
accounts.plaidNotConfigured: Plaid is not configured. Add PLAID_CLIENT_ID and PLAID_SECRET to your environment.
accounts.plaidOAuthMissingSession: Bank connection session expired. Please try connecting again from Accounts.
accounts.plaidOAuthInvalid: Invalid bank connection callback. Please try again from Accounts.
accounts.connectError: Failed to connect bank. Please try again.
accounts.syncNoAccounts: Stripe linked but no accounts were saved. Try Connect again — if it persists, set STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET from `pnpm stripe:listen` in .env and restart `pnpm dev`.
accounts.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured. Add STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY to your environment.
accounts.stripeTestModeDescription: Only sandbox test banks appear with test API keys. To link real US bank accounts, switch to live keys on a deployed HTTPS site after Stripe approves your Financial Connections application.
accounts.disconnectConfirm: Remove this bank account and its transactions from FlowRate?
accounts.sharedSpaceHintDescription: Switch to a Household or Family space using the sidebar switcher, then connect banks as Personal or Shared.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.emailHelp: Email is managed through Neon Auth. Change it in your account settings.
settings.phoneHelp: Used for SMS verification via Twilio. International format (E.164): country code, then number without the leading 0. Example: 09 87 76 54 32 → +33987765432.
settings.phoneFormatHint: Drop the leading 0 after the country code (e.g. +33987765432, not +330987765432).
settings.phoneUnverified: Not verified — enter the code we sent by SMS
settings.phoneCodeSent: Verification code sent to your phone
settings.phoneCodeInvalid: Invalid or expired code — try again
settings.phoneVerifyRequired: Save your number first, then enter the SMS code
settings.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number (e.g. +33987765432 or +14155552671)
settings.phoneVerificationFailed: Could not send SMS — check your number format and Twilio settings
settings.phoneTaken: This phone number is already linked to another account
settings.upgradeDescription: Upgrade to Pro to unlock unlimited bank connections, SaaS Shield alerts, predictive cash flow, and export features.
settings.planUnchanged: You are already on this plan.
settings.cancelViaPortal: To cancel or update your payment method, use the billing portal.
settings.manageDescription: Switch between monthly and yearly billing or change your plan. Stripe prorates the difference automatically.
settings.deleteWarning: Permanently delete your FlowRate account. This disconnects all linked banks, removes transactions, budgets, and subscriptions stored in FlowRate, cancels billing, and deletes your login. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteModalDescription: Type your email and password to confirm. All bank connections, transactions, and personal data in FlowRate will be erased. Shared family spaces you own will be transferred to another guardian when possible.
settings.deleteConfirmPasswordHelp: Required for email/password accounts. OAuth-only accounts may leave this blank if prompted.
settings.deleteFailed: Could not delete account. Please try again or contact mathieu.lievre.pro@outlook.com.
settings.upgradeSuccess: Welcome to Pro! Your plan is now active.
settings.upgradeCanceled: Checkout canceled — you can upgrade anytime from Settings.

legal.betaNotice: FlowRate is in active beta. Features, bank connections, billing, availability, and these legal documents may change without prior notice. The service may be incomplete, unstable, or temporarily unavailable. Nothing here is a promise to deliver a specific feature by a specific date. By using FlowRate during beta, you accept these limitations and understand that policies and product behavior may evolve.
legal.betaSectionNotice: Beta notice: the practices described in this section reflect our current product and may be updated as FlowRate develops.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: FlowRate (“we”, “us”, “our”) is a personal and household finance application currently in beta. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, who we share it with, where it is stored, and the choices you have. We aim to be transparent so you can make informed decisions about using FlowRate while the product is still in development.
privacy.contact: Questions about this policy or your data? Contact us at

overview.title: 1. Overview
overview.p1: FlowRate helps individuals, families, and small teams understand their money. You can connect bank accounts (via Stripe Financial Connections), view transactions, assign categories, track budgets, detect recurring subscriptions, and—when you choose—share selected accounts within a Household, Family, or Company space.
overview.p2: We do not sell your personal information. We do not share Financial Connections data with unrelated third parties for their own marketing or product development.

dataCollected.title: 2. Information we collect
dataCollected.p1: The data we process depends on how you use FlowRate:
items: Account information: name, email address, optional phone number, profile settings, and authentication data managed through Neon Auth.
Financial space data: space names, membership roles, invitations, and visibility preferences (personal vs shared accounts).
Connected bank data (when you choose to link): institution name, account display name, account type, last four digits, balances, and transaction history received through Stripe Financial Connections.
Derived data: transaction categories (including rule-based auto-categorization—no AI today), budget entries, detected subscriptions, analytics summaries, and split rules you configure.
Billing data: subscription plan and Stripe Billing customer identifiers if you upgrade to a paid plan.
Technical data: server logs, IP addresses, and request metadata generated when you use the app (for example through our hosting provider).

financialConnections.title: 3. Stripe Financial Connections
financialConnections.p1: When you connect a bank, you are redirected through Stripe’s Financial Connections flow. You authenticate directly with your financial institution or through Stripe’s secure interface. FlowRate never receives or stores your bank login credentials.
financialConnections.p2: With your explicit consent in the Stripe flow, we request read-only access to balances and transactions for the accounts you select. We use this data only to provide FlowRate features described in this policy.
financialConnections.p3: Linked institutions are US financial accounts, as supported by Stripe Financial Connections. You can disconnect a linked account at any time from the Accounts page in FlowRate, which removes the account and its imported transactions from our database and disconnects access through Stripe where applicable.
items: We do not use Financial Connections data for credit underwriting, lending decisions, or selling leads.
We do not request payment-method or ownership permissions unless we explicitly add those features and update this policy first.
We do not share raw Financial Connections data with advertisers, data brokers, or unrelated third parties.

howWeUse.title: 4. How we use your information
howWeUse.p1: We use the information above to operate and improve FlowRate, including:
items: Displaying account balances and transaction lists in your dashboard.
Categorizing transactions using rule-based matching on transaction descriptions (not artificial intelligence today), and letting you review or adjust categories.
Powering budgets, spending analytics, subscription detection, and space-specific views (for example family or company burn-rate summaries).
Enforcing visibility rules you set (personal vs shared accounts within a space).
Authenticating you, securing sessions, preventing abuse, and responding to support requests.
Processing optional paid subscriptions through Stripe Billing.
howWeUse.p2: We may use aggregated or de-identified statistics (that cannot reasonably identify you) to understand product usage and improve the service.

analytics.title: 5. Analytics and tracking
analytics.p1: FlowRate’s “Analytics” features refer to spending insights calculated from your own financial data inside the app—not third-party advertising or cross-site tracking.
analytics.p2: We do not use Google Analytics, advertising pixels, or sell behavioral profiles. Our hosting and infrastructure providers may record standard server logs (timestamps, URLs, error codes) for reliability and security.

ai.title: 6. Optional AI analysis (Pro and Enterprise)
ai.p1: FlowRate does not use artificial intelligence to process your financial data today. Standard features—including transaction categorization, subscription detection, and dashboard analytics—use rule-based logic and calculations on data stored in FlowRate.
ai.p2: We plan to offer optional AI-powered spending analysis and insights for Pro and Enterprise subscribers who explicitly opt in through Settings. This feature is not available yet; we will update this policy before it launches.
ai.p3: If you opt in when the feature becomes available, selected financial information (such as transaction descriptions, amounts, dates, categories, and aggregated spending summaries from your connected accounts) may be sent to third-party AI service providers solely to generate insights displayed to you inside FlowRate.
ai.p4: Opt-in is voluntary. Free plan users and paid users who do not opt in will not have their financial data sent for AI analysis. You may withdraw consent at any time in Settings; we will stop new AI processing promptly and request deletion of provider-side copies where our agreements allow.
items: AI insights are informational only—not financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. You should verify important decisions with qualified professionals.
We do not sell your financial data. AI providers process data only to deliver the feature on our behalf under contractual restrictions.
We will not use your opted-in financial data to train public AI models for unrelated third-party products without updating this policy and, where required, obtaining your consent.
Opting in to AI analysis is separate from connecting a bank account or subscribing to a paid plan—you must enable it explicitly.

sharing.title: 7. How we share information
sharing.p1: We share information only in these situations:
items: Service providers (subprocessors): companies that host, authenticate, connect banks, verify phone numbers, or—only if you opt in to AI analysis—generate AI insights on our behalf, solely to provide FlowRate to you. They may not use Financial Connections data for their own independent purposes.
Within your spaces: when you mark an account or data as shared, authorized members of that space (for example guardians in a Family space) can see it according to their role.
Legal requirements: if required by law, court order, or to protect rights, safety, and security.
Business transfers: if FlowRate is involved in a merger or acquisition, data may transfer subject to this policy.
sharing.p2: We do not share Financial Connections data with affiliates for their independent use, data brokers, or unrelated third parties that would use the data to improve their own products.

subprocessors.title: 8. Service providers (subprocessors)
subprocessors.p1: We rely on the following categories of providers. Each processes data only to deliver services to FlowRate:

table.name: Stripe
table.purpose: Financial Connections (bank linking), balance and transaction access, subscription billing
table.location: United States (and regions where Stripe operates)

table.name: Neon
table.purpose: User authentication (Neon Auth) and PostgreSQL database hosting

table.name: Twilio
table.purpose: Optional phone number verification (if you add a phone number)

table.name: AI service providers (opt-in only)
table.purpose: Optional AI spending analysis for Pro and Enterprise users who explicitly enable the feature—not used today
table.location: United States and/or other regions where the provider operates

storage.title: 9. Where we store data
storage.p1: We store application data only in the United States and/or countries within the European Union, using infrastructure providers that maintain data residency in those regions.
storage.p2: We do not intentionally store Financial Connections or personal data in countries outside the US or EU. If you require EU-only storage, contact us and we will work with you on supported configuration options for your account.

retention.title: 10. How long we keep data
retention.p1: We retain your data while your account is active and as needed to provide the service.
items: Profile and space data: until you delete your account or ask us to remove it.
Connected bank data: until you disconnect the account in FlowRate or delete your account.
Transactions and derived analytics: tied to the connected account or space; removed when you disconnect or delete.
Server logs: typically retained for a limited period for security and troubleshooting, then deleted or aggregated.

AI analysis requests (if opted in): retained only as long as needed to deliver insights and comply with law; deleted or anonymized when you opt out or delete your account, subject to provider retention limits.

yourRights.title: 11. Your choices and rights
yourRights.p1: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, export, or restrict processing of your personal data. FlowRate supports the following directly in the product or on request:
items: Access and update: edit your name and phone number in Settings; view your transactions, accounts, and budgets in the dashboard.
Disconnect banks: remove a linked account from the Accounts page (deletes imported transactions for that account in FlowRate).
Shared visibility: choose Personal or Shared when connecting banks in Household, Family, or Company spaces.
Delete account: use Settings → Delete my account for your own profile.
Guardians: delete a child or teen account from Family → child card or member details (permanent erasure of their FlowRate data and login).
Export: email mathieu.lievre.pro@outlook.com to request a copy of your data in a portable format.
Marketing: we do not send third-party advertising based on Financial Connections data.
AI analysis: when available, enable or disable optional AI insights in Settings. Disabling opt-in stops new AI processing of your financial data.
yourRights.p2: EU/UK users may also lodge a complaint with their local data protection authority. We will respond to verified requests within applicable legal timeframes.

security.title: 12. Security
security.p1: We use industry-standard measures including HTTPS encryption in transit, authenticated API access, and role-based permissions within financial spaces. Bank credentials are handled by Stripe and your financial institution—not stored on FlowRate servers.
security.p2: No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure. Please use a strong, unique password and notify us promptly if you suspect unauthorized access.

spaces.title: 13. Household, Family, and Company spaces
spaces.p1: When you join or create a shared space, certain information is visible to other members according to their role (owner, guardian, teen, finance admin, etc.). Teens and children may have supervised views with limited permissions.
spaces.p2: You are responsible for inviting only people you trust and for choosing Personal vs Shared visibility when connecting accounts.

children.title: 14. Children and teens
children.p1: Family spaces may include teen or child profiles managed by a parent or guardian. We collect only what is needed for supervised money management within those spaces. Guardians control invitations and visibility.
children.p2: FlowRate is not directed at children under 13 to create standalone accounts without parental involvement. If you believe we have collected data from a child improperly, contact mathieu.lievre.pro@outlook.com.

cookies.title: 15. Cookies and similar technologies
cookies.p1: We use essential cookies and similar storage for authentication sessions, locale preferences, and security. These are required for the app to function.
cookies.p2: We do not use advertising cookies or cross-site tracking cookies. You can clear cookies through your browser, but you may need to sign in again.

international.title: 16. International users
international.p1: FlowRate may be used by people in multiple countries. If you access the service from outside the US or EU, you understand that your data may be processed in the US and/or EU as described above.
international.p2: Where local law grants additional rights, we honor those rights to the extent applicable.

changes.title: 17. Changes to this policy
changes.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the revised version on this page and update the “Last updated” date. Material changes may also be communicated in the app or by email where appropriate.
changes.p2: Continued use of FlowRate after changes take effect means you accept the updated policy.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of FlowRate while the service is in beta. By creating an account or using the service, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy, including the limitations that apply during active development.
terms.contact: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at

agreement.title: 1. Agreement
agreement.p1: These Terms form a binding agreement between you and FlowRate. If you use FlowRate on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.

service.title: 2. The service
service.p1: FlowRate provides tools to view connected account balances and transactions, categorize spending (using rule-based logic today—not artificial intelligence), set budgets, detect subscriptions, and collaborate in optional financial spaces (Independent, Household, Family, or Company).
service.p2: We plan to offer optional AI-powered spending analysis for Pro and Enterprise subscribers who explicitly opt in. That feature is not available yet; when it launches, it will be governed by our Privacy Policy and your opt-in choice in Settings.
service.p3: Features may change over time. We may add, modify, or discontinue features with reasonable notice where practical.

eligibility.title: 3. Eligibility
eligibility.p1: You must be at least 18 years old to create a FlowRate account, unless you are a teen or child profile invited under a parent or guardian’s Family space.
eligibility.p2: You must provide accurate registration information and keep it up to date.

account.title: 4. Your account
account.p1: You are responsible for safeguarding your login credentials and for all activity under your account. Notify us immediately at mathieu.lievre.pro@outlook.com if you suspect unauthorized access.
account.p2: You may update profile information in Settings. Account deletion requests can be sent to mathieu.lievre.pro@outlook.com.

financialData.title: 5. Bank connections and financial data
financialData.p1: Bank linking is provided through Stripe Financial Connections. By connecting an account, you authorize Stripe and your financial institution to share the balances and transactions you select with FlowRate for the purposes described in our Privacy Policy.
financialData.p2: You represent that you have the right to connect each account you link. FlowRate does not verify ownership beyond what Stripe and your institution provide.
financialData.p3: Disconnecting an account in FlowRate stops future syncs and removes that account’s data from our application database, subject to backup retention described in our Privacy Policy.

spaces.title: 6. Shared spaces and visibility
spaces.p1: When you join a Household, Family, or Company space, you agree to respect the roles and permissions defined for that space. Information you mark as Shared may be visible to other authorized members.
spaces.p2: You are responsible for how you configure visibility and whom you invite. FlowRate is not responsible for disputes between members about shared financial information.

billing.title: 7. Paid plans and billing
billing.p1: Some features may require a paid subscription processed by Stripe Billing. Prices and plan details are shown at checkout. Subscriptions renew automatically until canceled through the billing portal or by contacting support.
billing.p2: Refunds are handled according to the policy displayed at purchase and applicable law.
billing.p3: Optional AI analysis, when available, requires a Pro or Enterprise subscription and a separate opt-in in Settings. Paying for a plan does not automatically enable AI processing of your financial data.

acceptableUse.title: 8. Acceptable use
items: Use FlowRate for any unlawful purpose or to violate others’ rights.
Attempt to access another user’s data without authorization.
Reverse engineer, scrape, or overload the service.
Misrepresent your identity or your authority to connect financial accounts.
Resell or redistribute Financial Connections data obtained through FlowRate.

disclaimers.title: 9. Not financial advice
disclaimers.p1: FlowRate is for informational and organizational purposes only. We do not provide financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. Categorizations, subscription detection, analytics, and any future AI-generated insights are automated estimates—you should verify important decisions with qualified professionals and your official bank records.
disclaimers.p2: AI analysis, when offered, may be inaccurate or incomplete. It does not replace professional judgment or official account records.

liability.title: 10. Disclaimers and limitation of liability
liability.p1: FlowRate is provided “as is” and “as available” without warranties of any kind, to the fullest extent permitted by law. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service, or that data synced from banks will always be complete or current.
liability.p2: To the maximum extent permitted by law, FlowRate and its operators will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for loss of profits, data, or goodwill arising from your use of the service.

termination.title: 11. Suspension and termination
termination.p1: We may suspend or terminate access if you violate these Terms, pose a security risk, or where required by law. You may stop using FlowRate at any time and request account deletion as described in the Privacy Policy.
termination.p2: Sections that by their nature should survive termination (including disclaimers and limitation of liability) will survive.

changes.title: 12. Changes to these Terms
changes.p1: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will post the updated version on this page and update the “Last updated” date. Continued use after changes take effect constitutes acceptance.
changes.p2: If you do not agree to updated Terms, you must stop using FlowRate and may request account deletion.

glba.title: Financial Privacy Notice (GLBA)
glba.intro: This Financial Privacy Notice describes how FlowRate collects, uses, and shares nonpublic personal information (“NPI”) about consumers in connection with our personal finance application, which is currently in beta. It is provided to meet transparency expectations under the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act (“GLBA”) and related U.S. financial privacy rules, including when you connect financial accounts through Stripe Financial Connections. This notice supplements our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service and may be updated as the product matures.
glba.contact: Questions about this Financial Privacy Notice or your NPI? Contact us at

purpose.title: 1. Purpose of this notice
purpose.p1: FlowRate is a personal and household finance application. We are not a bank, credit union, or other depository institution. When you choose to link a U.S. financial account, we receive certain financial information about you with your consent so we can display balances, transactions, budgets, and related features.
purpose.p2: This notice explains what NPI we handle, how we use it, who we may share it with, and the choices available to you. We provide this notice at or before the time you connect a financial account and make it available on our website at all times.

scope.title: 2. Who this notice covers
scope.p1: This notice applies to individuals who use FlowRate as consumers—including account holders, household members, family space participants, and authorized company space users—when we collect NPI about them in connection with the service.
scope.p2: If you use FlowRate solely on behalf of a business entity and not as a consumer, additional agreements may apply. Contact us if you need clarification for your organization.

npiDefinition.title: 3. What is nonpublic personal information (NPI)?
npiDefinition.p1: For purposes of this notice, NPI means personally identifiable financial information that is not publicly available. Examples include account balances, transaction history, account identifiers (such as institution name and last four digits), and information we derive from that data (such as spending categories or subscription detection).
npiDefinition.p2: Publicly available information—such as information lawfully made available from government records or widely distributed media—is not NPI when we have taken reasonable steps to confirm it is public.

whatWeCollect.title: 4. NPI we collect
whatWeCollect.p1: The NPI we collect depends on how you use FlowRate. Categories include:
items: Identity and contact information: name, email address, optional phone number, and authentication identifiers managed through our identity provider.

Connected account information: financial institution name, account display name, account type, masked account numbers, balances, and transaction details received through Stripe Financial Connections when you authorize access.
Derived financial information: transaction categories, budgets, subscription estimates, analytics summaries, and split rules you configure inside FlowRate.

Space and sharing data: membership roles, invitations, and visibility settings (personal vs shared) that determine who within a household, family, or company space may see linked financial information.
Billing information: subscription plan status and Stripe Billing customer identifiers if you purchase a paid plan (we do not store full payment card numbers).

howWeCollect.title: 5. How we collect NPI
howWeCollect.p1: We collect NPI directly from you when you register, update your profile, create or join spaces, and configure budgets or categories.
howWeCollect.p2: When you connect a bank account, you are directed through Stripe’s Financial Connections flow. You authenticate with your financial institution (or through Stripe’s secure interface). FlowRate does not receive or store your online banking username or password.
howWeCollect.p3: We may also receive limited technical data (such as IP address and request logs) generated when you use the application, as described in our Privacy Policy.

howWeUse.title: 6. How we use NPI
howWeUse.p1: We use NPI only for legitimate business purposes related to providing FlowRate, including:
items: Displaying account balances and transactions in your dashboard.
Categorizing transactions, powering budgets, subscription detection, and spending analytics (using rule-based logic today—not artificial intelligence unless you later opt in to AI analysis).
Generating optional AI spending insights for Pro and Enterprise users who explicitly opt in, when that feature becomes available.
Enforcing visibility and role permissions within financial spaces you create or join.
Authenticating you, securing the service, preventing fraud and abuse, and providing customer support.
Processing optional paid subscriptions through Stripe Billing.
Complying with law, responding to lawful requests, and protecting our rights and users’ safety.
howWeUse.p2: We do not use NPI to make credit eligibility decisions, sell leads to lenders, or build advertising profiles for unrelated third parties. We do not send NPI to AI providers unless you are on a qualifying paid plan, the AI feature is available, and you have opted in.

sharing.title: 7. How we share NPI
sharing.p1: We do not sell your NPI. We share NPI only in the limited circumstances below:
items: Service providers: trusted companies that process data on our behalf solely to operate FlowRate—for example Stripe (Financial Connections and billing), Neon (authentication and database hosting), Vercel (application hosting), and Twilio (optional phone verification). These providers may use NPI only to perform services for us and must protect it appropriately.

AI service providers (opt-in only): if you are a Pro or Enterprise subscriber and explicitly enable AI analysis when that feature is available, we may share selected NPI with third-party AI providers solely to generate insights for you inside FlowRate. This sharing does not occur today and never occurs without your opt-in.

Within your spaces: when you mark an account or data as shared, authorized members of that space (such as guardians in a Family space or finance admins in a Company space) can view it according to their role.
Affiliates: FlowRate does not currently share NPI with corporate affiliates for their own purposes.
Legal and safety: when required by law, regulation, legal process, or to protect the rights, property, or safety of FlowRate, our users, or others.
Business transfers: if FlowRate is involved in a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, NPI may transfer subject to this notice and applicable law.
sharing.p2: We do not share NPI with nonaffiliated third parties for them to market their own products or services to you.

optOut.title: 8. Your opt-out rights
optOut.p1: Under GLBA, consumers generally have the right to opt out of certain sharing of NPI with nonaffiliated third parties for those parties’ own marketing purposes.
optOut.p2: FlowRate does not share NPI with nonaffiliated third parties for their independent marketing. Because we do not engage in that type of sharing, there is no marketing opt-out list to join at this time.
optOut.p3: You still control your data in other important ways: disconnect linked accounts from the Accounts page, adjust Personal vs Shared visibility when connecting banks, leave or delete spaces, and delete your account from Settings. When AI analysis is available, you may opt in or out independently in Settings—opting out stops new AI processing. To exercise privacy rights or request data access or deletion, email mathieu.lievre.pro@outlook.com.

safeguards.title: 9. How we protect NPI
safeguards.p1: We maintain administrative, technical, and physical safeguards designed to protect NPI, including encryption in transit (HTTPS), authenticated access to APIs, role-based permissions within spaces, and limiting employee access to production data on a need-to-know basis.
safeguards.p2: Bank login credentials are handled by Stripe and your financial institution—not stored on FlowRate servers. No security program is perfect; please use a strong, unique password and notify us promptly if you suspect unauthorized access.

retention.title: 10. How long we keep NPI
retention.p1: We retain NPI while your account is active and as needed to provide the service, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements.
items: Connected account NPI: until you disconnect the account in FlowRate or delete your account.
Derived analytics and categories: removed when the underlying account data is deleted or disconnected.
Profile and space data: until you delete your account or request removal.
Server logs: retained for a limited period for security and troubleshooting, then deleted or aggregated.
AI analysis requests (if opted in): retained only as long as needed to deliver insights; stopped and deleted or anonymized when you opt out or delete your account, subject to provider limits.

formerCustomers.title: 11. After you stop using FlowRate
formerCustomers.p1: If you delete your account or disconnect all financial accounts, we delete or de-identify associated NPI from our application database within a reasonable period, subject to limited backup retention and legal retention requirements described in our Privacy Policy.
formerCustomers.p2: This Financial Privacy Notice continues to describe how we treated NPI while you were a user. An updated notice will apply if you return and connect accounts again.

otherNotices.title: 12. Relationship to other policies
otherNotices.p1: Our Privacy Policy provides additional detail about data practices, international users, cookies, children and teens, and subprocessors. Our Terms of Service govern your use of FlowRate.
otherNotices.p2: If there is a conflict between this Financial Privacy Notice and the Privacy Policy regarding NPI collected through financial account connections, this notice controls for that NPI.

changes.title: 13. Changes to this notice
changes.p1: We may update this Financial Privacy Notice from time to time. We will post the revised version on this page and update the “Last updated” date. Material changes may also be communicated in the app or by email where appropriate.
changes.p2: Continued use of FlowRate after changes take effect means you accept the updated notice, to the extent permitted by law.

validation.agreeToTerms: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.badRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input.
errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to continue.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.conflict: This action conflicts with existing data.
errors.validation: Please check your input and try again.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again later.

codes.INVALID_ORIGIN: This site URL is not authorized for sign-up. Add your deployment URL (e.g. https://your-app.vercel.app) under Neon Console → Auth → Configuration → Domains.
codes.STRIPE_KEY_MISMATCH: Stripe keys are mismatched — publishable and secret keys must both be test or both be live in Vercel.
codes.STRIPE_LIVEMODE_MISMATCH: A test-mode Stripe customer is linked to this account. Disconnect old banks or contact support after switching to live keys.
codes.STRIPE_FC_NOT_ENABLED: Financial Connections is not approved for live mode. Complete Stripe's Financial Connections application in your Dashboard.
codes.STRIPE_FC_PERMISSION_DENIED: Your Stripe Financial Connections application does not include balances and transactions permissions.
codes.STRIPE_CONNECT_FAILED: Could not start bank connection. Check Stripe live keys and Financial Connections settings.
codes.NO_ACTIVE_SPACE: No active financial space. Open Spaces and select a space, then try again.
codes.PLAN_LIMIT_BANKS: Free plan includes one bank connection. Upgrade to Pro to link more accounts.
codes.PLAN_LIMIT_SPACES: Free plan includes one financial space. Upgrade to Pro for Household, Family, and Business spaces.
codes.PLAN_LIMIT_SPACE_TYPE: Household, Family, and Business spaces require Pro or Enterprise.
codes.PLAN_LIMIT_SYNC_COOLDOWN: Free plan sync is limited to once per day. Upgrade to Pro for automatic sync.
codes.PLAN_LIMIT_SAAS_SHIELD: SaaS Shield and burn-rate metrics require Pro or Enterprise.
codes.PLAN_LIMIT_TEEN_ACCOUNTS: Teen and child accounts require Pro or Enterprise.
codes.PLAN_LIMIT_COMPANY_MEMBERS: This company space has reached its member limit. Upgrade to Enterprise for up to 10 members.
